title: Wazuh EDR - File Operations
description: Sysmon file-system events: Event ID 11 (FileCreate), 15 (FileCreateStreamHash / ADS), 23 (FileDelete), and 26 (FileDeleteDetected). Tracks file creation and deletion activity across endpoints — useful for detecting malware drops, ransomware, and data staging.

panels.title: Total File Events
panels.lucene: data_win_system_eventID:11 OR data_win_system_eventID:15 OR data_win_system_eventID:23 OR data_win_system_eventID:26
